title: Proximity Text Chat
description: Makes players only able to see chat messages sent near them.
body:
This mod makes it so that players have to be near each other to see each other's messages

 

It also has a mode that adds a range where players can only hear some of the words in the message by replacing some of the words with a phrase that can be defined in config, or underscores for each letter of the word.

Config is found in the config folder and is named proximitytextchat-common.toml
